title: xarop.com v9
body:
![xarop v9](http://farm4.static.flickr.com/3214/3064004152_878f964e5b_m.jpg)

New version of this blog. I took advantage of the update to WordPress 2.6.5 to change the design (an adaptation of the [Aeros theme](http://thebuckmaker.com/aeros/)). In this version, the content of the posts takes center stage. I also wanted to showcase [my activity on the various social networks I’m on](http://www.xarop.com/my-activity/) as well as leave space for Google Ads. What do you think?
